title: Tomathy Manes
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tomathy Manes''' was the senior duty officer at the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] installation on [[Utharis]] who informed [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] of the situation in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. Skywalker later erased his memory of the event.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
